value.name: Munchy's Oat Krunch Crackers - Chunky Hazelnut

metaData.Ingredients:
Oat Flakes, Wheat Flour, Vegetable Fat (Palm Oil), Sugar, Hazelnut, Glucose Syrup, Milk Powder, Calcium Carbonate, Raising Agents-sodium Bicarbonate (E500 (Ii)) and Ammonium Bicarbonate (E503 (Ii)), Emulsifier-lecithin (E322), Salt, Flavourings
• Contains: Wheat, nuts, milk and soybeans
• May contain: Traces of peanuts, as it has been made in a factory that uses peanut ingredients

• Trans-fat free
• No added preservatives
• Packed in a convenient sachet
• Rich in beta-glucan
